juegos.vacio: There are no games on this shelf yet.
juegos.sin_material: There isn't enough material to play this yet. Add pictograms or photos from "Pictograms".
juegos.interruptor_ayuda: If you turn this off, the child can still come in here, but the games will show greyed out, and tapping any of them will go straight to Home. Useful if you want them to only play through learning routes.

pin.crear_subtitulo: Create a PIN for this area
pin.aviso: The PIN is a simple latch so a child doesn't enter by accident. It is not real security.

pictogramas.error_busqueda: Could not connect to ARASAAC. Check your internet connection.
pictogramas.biblioteca_vacia: You haven't added any pictograms or photos yet.
pictogramas.biblioteca_vacia_arasaac: You haven't added any ARASAAC pictograms yet.
pictogramas.biblioteca_vacia_fotos: You haven't added any photos yet.
pictogramas.menu_ayuda: Choose what you want to manage.
pictogramas.foto_etiqueta_obligatoria: You must choose at least one category
pictogramas.borrar_medio_confirmar: Delete this item from the library?
pictogramas.secuencias_ayuda: Design a real-life routine here (brushing teeth, getting dressed...) as a list of pictograms in the right order. Games that order sequences will use the ones you create here.
pictogramas.secuencia_sin_pasos: You haven't added any steps yet.
pictogramas.secuencia_buscar_arasaac: Not in your library? Search it on ARASAAC
pictogramas.secuencia_buscar_arasaac_ayuda: The pictogram you choose will be added to your library and to this step of the sequence at the same time. You can search again and again, with different words for each step of the routine (for example: first "toothbrush", then "turn on the tap").
pictogramas.secuencia_error_nombre: Write a name for the sequence.
pictogramas.secuencia_error_pasos: Add at least {n} steps so they can be ordered.
pictogramas.secuencia_rota: A pictogram is missing: check this sequence
pictogramas.secuencias_vacio: You haven't created any sequence yet.
pictogramas.categorias_ayuda: Design pairs of opposite categories here (for example big/small, red/green...) for the "Sort pictograms into two categories" game. Each category needs a pictogram that represents it and at least one pictogram that belongs to it; each round the game will randomly pick one of the pairs you've created.
pictogramas.categoria_sin_cabecera: You haven't chosen a pictogram yet.
pictogramas.categoria_pictogramas_titulo: Pictograms that belong to this category
pictogramas.categoria_sin_pictogramas: You haven't added any pictograms yet.
pictogramas.categoria_seleccionar_cabecera_titulo: Choose the pictogram that represents category {n}
pictogramas.categoria_buscar_arasaac: Not in your library? Search it on ARASAAC
pictogramas.categoria_error_nombre: Write a name for the pair.
pictogramas.categoria_error_categorias: A pair needs exactly two categories.
pictogramas.categoria_error_nombre_categoria: Write a name for each category.
pictogramas.categoria_error_cabecera: Choose a pictogram to represent each category.
pictogramas.categoria_error_pictogramas: Add at least one pictogram to each category.
pictogramas.categoria_rota: A pictogram is missing: check this pair
pictogramas.categorias_vacio: You haven't created any pair of categories yet.

ajustes.idioma_ayuda: Changes the language for the whole app: text, pictograms and voice.
ajustes.voz_disponible: Your device has a voice for this language.
ajustes.voz_no_disponible: Your device doesn't have a voice installed for this language. The text will still show, but it may not be spoken, or may be spoken in another language.
ajustes.pin_estado_inactivo: You haven't created a PIN yet.
ajustes.copia_explicacion: Here you can save a copy of your library and settings to a file, or restore it later or on another device.
ajustes.copia_incluir_fotos_aviso: If you turn this on, the file will contain the child's photos. You decide where you keep it: Pictosfera never stores or sees any of this.
ajustes.copia_recuerda: The backup restores pictograms, names, categories, sequences, settings and PIN. Photos are not included unless you tick the box.
ajustes.copia_importar_confirmar: Importing this backup will replace your current library. Continue?
ajustes.copia_error: This backup file could not be read.
ajustes.recordatorio_copia: It's been more than 15 days since your last backup and you've added new material. Want to make one now?
ajustes.pistas_ayuda: Each game keeps its own settings, separate from the others. Choose a game to see and change its settings.
ajustes.pistas_sin_ajustes: This game has no settings of its own.
ajustes.pistas_mostrar: Show the hint word next to the pictogram
ajustes.pistas_resaltar_teclado: Highlight the keys needed to type the word on the keyboard
ajustes.pistas_mano_amiga_ayuda: These settings avoid complicating things for a child still learning to write. If you turn them off, the game will require typing that part correctly and will show the keys needed to do so.
ajustes.pistas_tildes_automaticas: Add accent marks automatically (á, é, í, ó, ú)
ajustes.pistas_mayusculas_automaticas: Don't require a capital initial on proper nouns
ajustes.pistas_puntuacion_automatica: Add commas, periods and other punctuation automatically
ajustes.pistas_presentacion_ayuda: These settings change how the pictogram is shown in the game. They're optional and turned off by default.
ajustes.pistas_solo_texto: Show only the word's text, without the pictogram image
ajustes.pistas_pulsador_tts: Replace the pictogram with a listen button (must be pressed before answering)
ajustes.pistas_escritura_ayuda: These settings are only for the guided letter-by-letter writing games ("Write the letter").
ajustes.pistas_letra_punteada: Show the letter as a dotted outline inside each box, as a guide to trace over
ajustes.pistas_ruleta_ayuda: This setting is only for the "Letter wheel" game.
ajustes.pistas_dificultad_ruleta: Letter wheel difficulty (word length, hint frequency and alphabet size)
ajustes.pistas_lista_solo_texto: In the shopping list, show only the text, without the pictogram image
ajustes.pistas_estante_solo_imagen: On the shelf, show only the pictogram, without the text below
ajustes.pistas_huecos_libres: Advanced difficulty: blanks can appear anywhere in the sequence, not just at the end
ajustes.privacidad_texto: Pictosfera has no server or database of its own. Everything you add lives only on this device, in this browser. If you clear your browser data, everything will be lost unless you have an exported backup; photos are only recovered if you included them in that backup.

pwa.sugerencia: Install Pictosfera as an app to always have pictograms at hand, even without internet.
pwa.sugerencia_ios: Install Pictosfera: tap the Share button (⎏) and then «Add to Home Screen».
pwa.seccion_texto: If you install Pictosfera as an app, the browser won't delete pictograms or settings even when it clears the cache. You'll also be able to open it without internet.
pwa.ya_instalada: Pictosfera is already installed as an app on this device.
pwa.explicacion_boton: Tap the button to install. The browser will ask for confirmation.
pwa.instrucciones_ios: In Safari, tap the Share button (⎏) and then «Add to Home Screen». This installs Pictosfera as an app and keeps your data safe.
pwa.no_disponible: Your browser doesn't support installing Pictosfera as an app. Try Chrome or Edge on Android.

rutas.explicacion: A learning route is a guided itinerary: an ordered list of games that the child plays one after another. Each game only unlocks once the previous one is finished with no mistakes at all. You can create as many routes as you like; each one will show up in "Home" as another card, alongside the normal access to Games.
rutas.vacio: You haven't created any route yet.
rutas.no_encontrada: This route doesn't exist or has been deleted.
rutas.aviso_editar_reinicia: When you save these changes, any progress the child had on this route will reset back to the first game.
rutas.pasos_titulo: Games in the route, in order
rutas.sin_pasos: You haven't added any game yet.
rutas.config_ayuda: These settings only apply to this game inside this route: they don't affect direct access from Games, nor any other route.
rutas.error_nombre: Write a name for the route.
rutas.error_pasos: Add at least {n} game so the route can be saved.
rutas.bloqueado: Locked: finish the previous game with no mistakes first

comunes.error_generico: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bienvenida.texto_1: A portal of pictogram games, free, designed so your child's data stays only on this device.
bienvenida.texto_2: From "Pictograms" you can add your own photos and organise the material used by the games.
bienvenida.texto_3: From time to time, save a backup from "Settings". That way you won't lose your work if you change devices or clear your browser data. The backup does not include photos unless you choose to.

puerta.texto: Tap the button to open Pictosfera in full screen.

memoria.instrucciones: Tap two cards to find the matching pair.

arrastra.instrucciones: Drag the correct word onto the pictogram.

teclea.instrucciones: Look at the pictogram and type its name on the keyboard.

ordena.instrucciones: Drag or tap each pictogram and place it in the slot it belongs to, in the right order.
ordena.sin_secuencias: No playable sequence has been designed yet. Go to Pictograms → Sequences to create one.

escribe.instrucciones: Look at the pictogram and write each letter inside its box, with a finger or a stylus.
escribe.casilla_bloqueada: Locked box: finish the previous letter first

bingo.instrucciones: Look at the ball from the bingo cage and tap the matching pictogram or word on your card.

ruleta.instrucciones: Spin the wheel and follow its result: choose letters, get hints or free letters until you complete the word and uncover the pictogram.
ruleta.abecedario_bloqueado: Spin the wheel: if it lands on "Choose a letter", you'll be able to tap the alphabet

rosco.instrucciones: Listen to the clue and tap the one pictogram, among the four, that matches it.

arrastraNumero.instrucciones: Count the pictograms and drag the correct number onto the box.

escribeNumero.instrucciones: Count the pictograms and write the matching number inside the box, with your finger or a stylus.

sumaResultado.instrucciones: Count both groups of pictograms, add them up, and tap the correct result.

dedosPictogramas.instrucciones: Count the raised fingers and tap the group of pictograms with that same amount.

dedosNumero.instrucciones: Count the raised fingers and tap the correct number.

completaSuma.instrucciones: Look at the addition shown with pictograms and write the matching number in each box.

arrastraSuma.instrucciones: Look at the addition shown with pictograms and drag, onto each box, the number that matches it.

restaResultado.instrucciones: Count the pictograms in the big group, discount the crossed-out ones, and tap the correct result.

completaResta.instrucciones: Look at the subtraction shown with pictograms and write the matching number in each box.

arrastraResta.instrucciones: Look at the subtraction shown with pictograms and drag, onto each box, the number that matches it.

clasificaCategorias.instrucciones: Drag each pictogram to the category it belongs to.

puzzle.instrucciones: Look at the pictogram above and drag each piece onto the slot it belongs to. Once you complete the picture, choose the word that names it.

relacionaPictogramaPalabra.instrucciones: Drag each picture to the text it matches.

meGusta.instrucciones: Look at each food and drag it onto the plate if you like it, or onto the bin if you don't.

listaCompra.instrucciones: Look at the shopping list and tap or drag onto the cart only the pictograms that are on the list.

reconoceEmociones.instrucciones: Look at the face and tap the pictogram that shows how it feels.

categorias.aviso_arbol: For now this is a short list of categories. Later, the official ARASAAC category tree will be embedded here.

core.error_cargar_apps: Could not load the list of games.
core.sin_conexion_arasaac: Could not connect to ARASAAC. Check your internet connection.

juegos_nombres.suma_resultado_animales: Add pictograms and choose the result
juegos_nombres.completa_suma_animales: Write the numbers of the addition
juegos_nombres.arrastra_suma_animales: Drag the numbers of the addition
juegos_nombres.resta_resultado_animales: Subtract pictograms and choose the result
juegos_nombres.completa_resta_animales: Write the numbers of the subtraction
juegos_nombres.arrastra_resta_animales: Drag the numbers of the subtraction
juegos_nombres.clasifica_categorias: Sort the pictograms into two categories
juegos_nombres.relaciona_pictograma_palabra_animales: Match the picture to its word
juegos_nombres.me_gusta_no_me_gusta_comidas: I like it / I don't like it

footer.autor: Pictosfera — developed by Roberto Corral Retuerta.
footer.licencia: Free distribution and use of this site is authorised provided the author is always credited (Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 license — CC BY 4.0).
footer.arasaac: The pictographic symbols used are the property of the Government of Aragón and were created by Sergio Palao for ARASAAC, distributed under Creative Commons license (BY-NC-SA).

armaPersonaje.instrucciones: Choose the right pieces to copy the model ghost.

completaSerie.instrucciones: Drag the correct pieces to complete the series.

cuadriculaMultiplicacion.instrucciones: Select the area in the grid that represents the multiplication and press '?' to check it.

equilibra.instrucciones: Place monkeys on the right side to balance the branch.

completa.instrucciones: Choose which monkey is missing to balance the branch.

suma.instrucciones: Which position should the monkey on the right side go to balance?

descompone.instrucciones: Place monkeys on the left side to balance the branch.

copia.instrucciones: Reproduce the same configuration as the model.

falta.instrucciones: Choose the missing position so the branch is balanced.

cual-pesa.instrucciones: Which side of the branch weighs more?

corrige.instrucciones: Move the monkeys on the right side until the branch is balanced.

limitado.instrucciones: Use exactly the available monkeys to balance the branch.

soluciones.instrucciones: Find several different ways to balance the branch.
